headline: Camp Dream GA blends direct bookings, guided planning, and content-led trust into one public experience
subheadline: Instead of forcing every visitor through the same path, the site supports self-serve decisions, premium planning help, and compliant content growth side by side.
stepsHeadline: A sharper route from first visit to confident action

steps.title: Discover through search or referral
steps.description: Visitors arrive through useful content, branded pages, or direct program interest.

steps.title: Build trust through clarity
steps.description: The site makes the difference between direct booking, guided planning, and custom retreat scoping obvious.

steps.title: Move into the right conversion path
steps.description: That keeps revenue opportunities aligned with real visitor intent.

sections.title: Direct booking support
sections.description: Some visitors want the cleanest possible path to reserve an experience immediately.

sections.title: Guided planning support
sections.description: Others need help choosing the right package or shaping a more personalized family experience.

sections.title: Content-led trust
sections.description: Original resources make the brand more discoverable and more credible over time.

faq.question: Why keep content and bookings on the same site?
faq.answer: Because strong original content helps visitors trust the brand, supports search growth, and naturally bridges into the right booking path.
